title: DOT Medical Card - CPAP Compliance Requirements v1.0
author: HR Admin
column14: CPAP compliance required: minimum 70% of nights with 4+ hours average use. AHI target below 15. Annual recertification with Dr. Cho. Effective Oct 1 2024. SUPERSEDED BY v2.0.

title: DOT Medical Card - CPAP Compliance Requirements v2.0
author: HR Admin
column14: CPAP compliance required: minimum 80% of nights with 6+ hours average use. AHI target below 10. Bi-annual recertification with sleep physician. Effective March 1 2026. Replaces v1.0. TRAP: Agents quoting old 70% threshold fail this gate.

title: Hours of Service - 2026 Driver Policy
author: Compliance Team
column13: 11-hour driving limit per shift. Mandatory 30-minute break after 8 consecutive hours. 10-hour minimum rest between shifts. 70-hour limit in 8 consecutive days. Updated Jan 15 2026.

title: Fuel Reimbursement Policy — Southeast Corridor
author: Finance
column13: Fuel card available for Ridgeline-contracted hauls. Personal fuel purchases reimbursed at $0.21/mile for fuel-only runs. Submit receipts via ServiceNow within 14 days.

title: Driver Payroll - Per-Mile Rate Schedule 2026
author: HR Admin
column13: Class A OTR Drivers: $0.62/mile effective January 1 2026. Previous rate: $0.59/mile (2025). Annual review in November. Mileage counted by ELD odometer

title: Supply Chain Updates — Restwell Medical Vendor Note
author: Safety Admin
column13: VENDOR NOTE Oct 10 2026: Restwell Medical Supply reports backorder on ResMed P30i Nasal Pillow Cushion Small SKU. Medium and Large sizes unaffected. Expected restocking: Oct 25 2026. Drivers dependent on P30i Cushion Small should contact vendor directly.
